arts.ttl: Burnley thump Sheff Wed to boost automatic promotion hopes
arts.sum: The goals finally flowed for Burnley as they beat Sheffield Wednesday 4-0 at Turf Moor to extend their incredible unbeaten run in the Championship to 21 games.
